content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages engagement through choice.
• Makes each class session unique & dynamic.
• Aligns with RPG mechanics by incorporating agency into learning.

📜 3. Historical Anchor – Expanded to Include Four-Tiered Echoes

📜 Each week will now analyze a theme across four different historical moments:
✔ Past Event: A specific historical moment pre-dating the text’s publication.
✔ Present Event: A major contemporary moment at the time of publication.
✔ Modern Echo: A recent event showing the theme’s relevance today.
✔ Future Projection: A speculative creative exercise imagining how the theme may evolve.

Example: Week 7 – Postmodernism & The Collapse of Grand Narratives
📅 Past: The invention of the printing press (1450s) → The democratization of knowledge.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 52 (chunk 52/555)
